positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a stylized, friendly woodland creature (like a fox or raccoon) reaching into a basket overflowing with delicate, geometric wildflowers and autumn leaves. The composition should be highly centered and symmetrical, utilizing strong silhouette contrast and limited, earthy color palette (deep terracotta, mustard yellow, muted forest green, cream). The artwork style must be clean, modern, and highly scalable, resembling a sophisticated screen-printed textile motif. Focus on bold lines and distinct, recognizable shapes, perfect for repeating patterns or central apparel placement. Full body shot, natural light, high contrast, vector art, graphic novel aesthetic.
negative: photorealistic, detailed skin, text, signature, watermark, logo, blurry, noisy, artifacts, messy background, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, poor composition, low resolution
